title: Diamond Lakes Region CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity Acquire a highly regarded, well-established CPA practice in Arkansas’s scenic Diamond Lakes region, boasting an exceptionally loyal clientele and an experienced, capable staff. This turn-key firm delivers excellent, consistent cash flow to the owner and is primed for a seamless handoff to a CPA buyer, with the seller fully committed to assisting during the transition.

title: SW Kansas CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity Step into a well-established Southwest Kansas CPA practice boasting a strong fee structure and an experienced, loyal team in place. Generating a nice cash flow for the owner, this turnkey firm is primed for a smooth transition as the current owner approaches retirement and offers transitional support. The practice is fully rooted and positioned to remain in its current location.

title: NE Kansas Tax and Accounting Firm
description: This NE Kansas tax and accounting firm has two locations in the area and the owner is seeking to sell the firm to a buyer who has significant tax preparation experience. With a loyal client base and experienced staff, the firm is ready for new ownership and can remain in the current offices after a sale. Owner is willing to assist with a smooth transition and could be available longer if needed by a buyer.

title: North of KC CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity Seize the opportunity to acquire a well-established, fully paperless CPA practice with a good reputation. The retiring seller is seeking a qualified CPA buyer and is fully committed to providing structured transition assistance to ensure seamless client retention. This practice is attractive due to its deep-rooted community presence, paperless office systems, and a large number of loyal business clients.

title: Virtual Colorado-Based Attest Client List
description: Opportunity Expand your firm’s footprint with a highly streamlined, 100% remote client list ready for immediate absorption. Built by owners preparing for retirement, this profitable portfolio is ideal for an established CPA firm looking to scale their recurring revenue. Due to the requirements of attest work, the buyer must be a licensed CPA. Some onsite fieldwork will be required.

title: Greater Atlanta Area CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity High-demand opportunity to acquire a well-established, single-owner CPA practice in Cobb County in the Atlanta metro area. Founded and built from the ground up, this firm is characterized by its resilience, premium client loyalty, and a trajectory of consistent year-over-year revenue growth. This is an ideal acquisition for an individual CPA or EA practitioner looking to step into a turnkey operation or an existing CPA or EA firm seeking to expand its footprint in the lucrative North Atlanta market.

title: South St Louis County CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity Seize the opportunity to acquire a thriving, well-balanced CPA practice in South St. Louis County. Boasting a strong fee structure and excellent cash flow to the owner, this firm is perfectly positioned for a seamless handover. The practice features a highly experienced staff and a loyal client base that provides steady, year-round revenue. The current owner is approaching retirement but is fully committed to staying on for a customized transition period to another CPA to ensure client retention and operational continuity. This rapidly growing Enrolled Agent (EA) firm in Fayetteville offers the perfect blend of skyrocketing revenue and operational stability for a CPA or EA buyer. To keep pace with its accelerated growth, the forward-thinking seller has proactively hired a talented, capable team—meaning the firm is fully staffed for the 2027 tax season and ready for a seamless hand-off. title: Little Rock CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity This well-established Little Rock CPA firm is on the market as the current owners prepare for retirement. Boasting a healthy fee structure and a diverse base of business clients, the practice generates excellent cash flow. Currently managed by two owners working a combined 1.25 FTE, the firm offers significant efficiency and work-life balance. The practice is primed for a smooth handover, with the sellers committed to assisting in the transition. The office can remain in its current location or be easily integrated into another local firm.

title: NW Little Rock Metro Area
description: The Opportunity An exceptional opportunity is available to acquire a nice CPA firm in the Northwest Little Rock metro area. The retiring seller has built a deeply loyal clientele backed by a talented, established staff. This practice is ideal for an individual CPA seeking entrepreneurship or an established firm looking for a strategic regional expansion.

title: Tulsa Area CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity This is a premier opportunity to acquire a well-established CPA firm in the Tulsa area. Known for its strong local legacy and modernized operations, this practice offers a turnkey solution for a buyer seeking a firm with high-quality realization and an efficient workflow. With its strong fee structure and loyal clientele, this firm is perfectly positioned for a CPA buyer looking to expand their footprint in Oklahoma or for an individual practitioner ready to step into a high-performing legacy practice.

title: Northern Lake County, IN CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity Step into a thriving, highly reputable accounting practice strategically positioned in Lake County, IN, in a Chicago suburb near the IN/IL border. Boasting an enviable fee structure and excellent cash flow to the sole owner, this firm features a large loyal base of business clients that offers consistent, year-round revenue. The seller is committed to a smooth transition and is seeking a qualified CPA buyer but is open to an experienced EA and selling the attest work separately.

title: Tulsa CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity An established and reputable Tulsa CPA firm is on the market as the owner prepares for retirement. This practice boasts a loyal, long-standing client base and an experienced staff, ensuring a smooth transition for a CPA buyer. Featuring a strong fee structure and nice cash flow to the owner, the firm operates out of a great location with the option to remain in the current space. This is an ideal, turnkey opportunity for an individual CPA or an existing firm looking to expand their footprint in the Tulsa market.

title: El Paso CPA Firm
description: The seller of this El Paso CPA firm is approaching retirement and seeking a CPA buyer for the firm. Boasting a loyal clientele, a large number of business clients, an experienced staff, and a nice cash flow to the owner, this firm is a great opportunity for a CPA (or two!) to own their own firm or for an existing firm to seek another location. The seller is willing to assist with a smooth transition and the firm can remain in its current location.

title: North Central AR CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity This CPA firm located in the central part of northern Arkansas has built an excellent reputation by delivering high-quality professional services to a loyal client base. The practice boasts a nice fee structure and consistently delivers stable cash flow to the owner, making it an exceptional opportunity for an individual CPA or an existing firm looking to expand.

title: South Central KS Tax and Bookkeeping Firm
description: The Opportunity S Central KS Tax & Bookkeeping Firm is a well established, highly reputable, fully paperless, two-location accounting and tax practice located in South Central Kansas. The seller is seeking a CPA or EA buyer. The firm is known for its long standing presence and exceptional client relationships and has built a strong brand and a loyal following across both individual and business markets. This is a turnkey opportunity for an experienced tax and accounting professional, multi office firm, or strategic buyer seeking immediate revenue, operational efficiency, and a strong foothold

title: Albuquerque CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity A nice opportunity has become available in the Albuquerque market. This established CPA firm strikes the perfect balance between stable, immediate profitability and a genuinely enviable workflow. Whether you are a CPA, EA, or other experienced preparer looking for a reliable “quality of life” practice or a solid foundation to scale, this firm is structured to deliver.

title: Waco Area CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity We are pleased to announce a new opportunity for a CPA or EA to acquire an established practice in the Waco area. The seller is approaching retirement and is looking for a qualified successor to take over a firm backed by a solid team and consistent performance.

title: Syracuse CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity This is a prime opportunity to acquire a thriving CPA firm in Syracuse, New York. The current owner is transitioning toward retirement and is looking for a qualified successor with a strong background in public accounting and tax preparation to carry on the firm’s legacy.

title: Virtual EA Firm
description: This boutique firm is a fully virtual, full service firm providing CAS and tax preparation services to cannabis clients nationwide. With strong systems and standards in place, the firm is stable and ready to be transferred to a new owner. Most clients have been converted to flat-rate billing, providing consistent revenues. The seller only works part-time in the firm and is seeking a buyer to focus on other business interests. The seller and current staff are willing to assist with a smooth transition to a new team.

title: SE MO CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity The owners of this reputable Southeast Missouri practice with two established locations are seeking a qualified CPA to carry on their legacy as they prepare for retirement. This is a turnkey opportunity featuring a diverse client base, a solid local reputation, and nice owner cash flow.

title: NE Arkansas CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity This well-regarded practice operates as a second office for a prominent CPA firm. The owners are planning for retirement and are looking for a qualified CPA or EA to take the reins. With a loyal client base and a seasoned team already in place, this is an ideal “turnkey” opportunity for a first-time owner or an existing firm looking to expand its footprint. The office space is available for continued lease, ensuring a seamless transition for both staff and clients.

title: Ark-La-Tex CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity Seize the opportunity to acquire a highly reputable CPA firm with deep roots in the Ark-La-Tex region. The current owners are preparing for retirement and are seeking a qualified CPA to carry on the firm’s legacy of excellence. This practice is characterized by its robust fee structure, nice cash flow, and a loyal client base that has been cultivated over years of service.

title: South Central Kansas CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity Located in the heart of Central Southern Kansas, this well-established CPA firm is known for its professional integrity and deep-rooted client loyalty. With a solid fee structure and a turnkey operational setup, this practice is primed for a seamless transition to a growth-oriented CPA.

title: Durham EA Firm
description: The Opportunity This Durham-based EA firm offers a nice opportunity for a CPA, EA, or experienced tax professional to acquire a practice with deep community roots and a turnkey operational structure. Located in a thriving, high-growth corridor, the firm is supported by a loyal, long-term client base and an established team in place, ensuring stability from day one. The current owners are committed to a seamless transition, and the office location is available for continued lease, providing immediate continuity for both staff and clients.

title: Springfield Area CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity This well-established CPA firm in the Springfield area is an ideal acquisition for a CPA or EA looking for a turnkey operation with a modern edge. Whether you are looking to expand your existing footprint in Missouri or step into your first practice with a built-in support system, this firm is positioned for immediate success. The firm boasts a solid fee structure and a reputation for efficiency and the sellers are prepared to assist the buyer during the transition period. title: NWA CPA
description: The sellers of this NWA CPA firm are approaching retirement but are willing to assist with a smooth transition of the firm after a sale and are seeking a CPA or EA buyer. There are so many reasons to like this firm, including a great fee structure, a nice cash flow to the owners and most of the clients’ information is handled through the portal or through a drop off/pick up system. The building is available for lease.

title: Austin CPA Firm
description: The Opportunity This Austin CPA firm is a high-quality, well-established firm located in a prime area, serving a diverse portfolio that includes the construction, restaurant, and service industries. Unlike many traditional firms, this practice features a client base primarily aged 50 and younger, offering long-term retention and growth potential.

title: South Ft Worth
description: The motivated seller of this CPA firm in south Ft Worth is approaching retirement and is seeking a buyer for the firm. The practice boasts a loyal clientele, about half of which speak both Spanish and English. The firm is well-staffed with experienced employees, and most are bilingual as well. The practice can remain in its current location following a sale and owner is willing to assist with a smooth transition. Some seller financing could be available for a qualified buyer.
